zh.lifeSummary: George Dunbar 11th Earl of Dunbar - Lieutenant of the castle of Cockburnspath, Berwickshire是Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March和Christina Seton的兒子，於大約1370年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴。他於大約1390年與Beatrix結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1385年登記服兵役。他去世於1455年8月在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年86歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: George Dunbar 11th Earl of Dunbar - Lieutenant of the castle of Cockburnspath, Berwickshire was born about 1370, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland as the son of Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March and Christina Seton. He married Beatrix about 1390. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1385. He died in August 1455, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 86.

Il a épousé Beatrix environ 1390. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1385. Il est décédé en août 1455, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 86 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: George Dunbar 11th Earl of Dunbar - Lieutenant of the castle of Cockburnspath, Berwickshireは約1370年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーでSir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of MarchとChristina Setonの息子として生まれた。約1390年にBeatrixと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1385年に兵役登録をした。彼は1455年8月にスコットランドアルグイルで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: George Dunbar 11th Earl of Dunbar - Lieutenant of the castle of Cockburnspath, Berwickshire(은)는 대략 1370년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March(와)과 Christina Seton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1390년 Beatrix(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1385년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1455년 8월 스컷랜드 아그이에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: George Dunbar 11th Earl of Dunbar - Lieutenant of the castle of Cockburnspath, Berwickshire родился около 1370 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. Его родителей звали Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March и Christina Seton. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix около 1390 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1385 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер август 1455 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 86 лет.
